target.kind.description: Target kind such as file, app, or desktop_connection.

target.name_hint.description: Safe fuzzy target name hint from user text.

target.path_hint.description: Optional user-provided path hint. First stage must not expand it into full search.

target.time_hint.description: Recent, yesterday, current, or other contextual time hint.

target.identity.description: Contextual identity such as current item or recent item.

query.choice_index.description: User choice index for pending candidate continuation.
